messages.content:
Create a scam-baiting response to the most recent email, to keep the scammer in a false sense of security by posing as a potential victim. Use the name Cameron McCaffrey and email address cmccaff1@fau.edu

Email #1, from Cameron (scam-baiter):

Dear <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

I hope this message finds you well. I was genuinely surprised and delighted to receive your email regarding the transfer of funds from the United Nations through an affiliate bank in Turkey. It’s not every day that one gets such promising news, and I must admit, it is quite overwhelming.

My name is Cameron McCaffrey, and I am keen on proceeding with the necessary steps to facilitate this transfer. However, I want to ensure that everything is done correctly and securely, considering the significant amount involved.

Before I provide my full details, I have a few questions that I hope you don’t mind answering for clarity:

1. Could you provide more information on the origin of these funds and why they are being transferred to me? I understand the United Nations is involved, but I would appreciate more details on this matter.

2. Is there a particular reason the transfer is being conducted through a bank in Turkey? I am curious about the selection of the country and the bank.

3. Will there be any charges or fees that I need to be aware of before the transfer is initiated? I would like to prepare accordingly.

As requested, here are some preliminary details to start the process:

- Full Name: Cameron McCaffrey
- Direct telephone number: Due to my current location and job, I’m not always available by phone. But, I can be reached at this email: cmccaff1@fau.edu. For WhatsApp, may I first verify the process before sharing my number?
- Occupation: Research Assistant at FAU
- Age: 29

I prefer to proceed with sending the rest of my details, including banking information and identification, once I have received the answers to my questions for my peace of mind. I trust you understand the need for caution from my end.

Thank you for considering my request, and I am looking forward to your swift response to proceed with the transfer.

Best regards,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Email #2, from Kevin:



Cameron McCaffrey

I am in receipt of your response and your questions is well noted which makes me so Happy and Humble at you intelligence and so I will make everything clear to your understanding, First My names are Barrister Kevin Peter and I am reaching you in respect of a particular fund that I know will belongs to you and just have to explain to you where this fund is from, This fund arise from United Nations trust fund and it was Provided by the united Nations to Cautions the effect and devastating impact of covid 19 to people all over the world, So a draw was carry out to ascertain those that will be  beneficiary and lucky ones and for no doubt your email was among those that was put in the draw and luckily yours and some other where those that get to be lucky as selected people that will benefit from this good gesture carry out by the United Nations to help THEM recovered from covid 19 trouble.
However, as regards  your question about the bank in Turkey I must say here that there was no reason for a bank in Turkey been nominated to carry out this transfer, actually it was not only a bank in Turkey is involved in this payment some other Banks both in Europes,Asia,The United States where Selected for this purpose because it involved a whole lot of people that should be attended to and a lot of Banks has to be involve so it is not only the bank in TURKEY that is handling this payment, so according to the schedule a bank can be  mentioned and not been use if the beneficiary don’t want such bank or the Country, so that is nothing to worry about as your payment if facilitated can be transfer to you from any other bank that are involved in this payment both from Asia, other European Countries and the United States, All will depend on where there is available cash at that point in time.

Your question about fee was a nice one and it shows that you really want to be clear on issues such as this, yes there will be a kind of fee or expenses that should be made by the beneficiary and it is not for me to say because whatever fee or cost to be made by you  will not be for a personal use but for the purpose of processing all necessary procedures that will see to the successful transfer of this said fund to you, hence I must let you know that even as there will be some kind of fee it is for the good of getting all process in place without hitches, so yes there will be a fee and I am trusting that you can afford  it when we shall get to that level.

I want to believe that I have made myself clear to you and what you should knew is that your privacy will be protected and the confidentiality of this is that we shall do it in a way that we will make sure that when you finally received this fund to yourself it will not be tax by your Home government, That was why we must make kept this proceedings by processing all the necessary Documents that will protect your interest.

I wait to hear from you.

Regards
Barrister <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>

Email #3, from Cameron:

 Dear Barrister <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Thank you for your comprehensive response and for taking the time to clarify my concerns. Your explanation has indeed shed light on the nature of the funds, the involvement of the United Nations, and the logistical side regarding the choice of banks across different regions. The noble cause behind this fund, aimed at alleviating the effects of the COVID-19 pandemic, heightens my appreciation for being selected as a beneficiary. It’s both humbling and exhilarating to be part of such a global gesture of goodwill.

Understanding that various banks are involved and that there’s flexibility depending on the availability of funds reassures me. It’s pragmatic and thoughtful to manage the transfers in such a manner, ensuring that beneficiaries around the world can access their funds efficiently.

Regarding the fees or expenses necessary for processing, I appreciate your honesty and transparency. I fully understand that certain procedural costs need to be covered to facilitate a smooth and secure transfer. While eager to proceed, I would appreciate getting an estimate of these fees. Knowing the expected financial commitment will help me prepare accordingly, ensuring that the process moves forward without any undue delay.

Additionally, your assurance regarding privacy and the strategic measures to avoid unnecessary taxation on the received funds speaks volumes of your professionalism and the careful planning invested in this initiative. It’s reassuring to know that you have the beneficiaries’ best interests at heart.

Before we proceed further, may I request a bit more information for my records and peace of mind?

1. Could you provide documentation or official communication from the United Nations or the involved bank detailing the transfer process and confirming my selection as a beneficiary? This would greatly aid in making the necessary arrangements on my end.

2. With the mention of possible banks across Asia, Europe, and the United States, could I express a preference based on my current financial arrangements, or is the bank strictly assigned?

3. Lastly, for the processing fee, could you outline the payment methods accepted? This information will ensure that I can meet the requirements efficiently and securely.

I am ready and willing to take the next steps required on my end. Please advise me on the best course of action, and rest assured, my cooperation and commitment to seeing this through are unwavering.

Looking forward to your guidance, and thank you once again for this life-changing opportunity.

Best regards,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Email #4, from Kevin:



Cameron McCaffrey

I have to confirm the receipt of your email response to me and I am very much please  for the fact that we are going  through the process of understanding between us which will lead to great success and achievement, Hence I owe it as an obligation to put you through anything you may not have understand about this process, Yes your questions was a nice one once again because it gives rooms for you to know what you are about getting into so I will clarify you that as well
Regarding the details and documents  I want to promised you that I will send it to you though some of it make have been might have been black by now due the long time it have been espouse on air and dust but I will do my best to get the once available ok

About the bank that handle this process I am sure you did not misunderstood me  on what I said because I want to be clear on issues as concerns this, off course i told you  that banks where giving the duties of paying covid 19 compensation fund and relief fund to beneficiary and when all this where going on it  was done in between a beneficiary and the concerns Authority and it is not only one bank that was used for this purpose so as I have told you before now  if at the end you agree to proceed it may be that you payment might come either from any of the mentions place in accordance to the Direction of the Process which required that no beneficiary will be expose due to the fact that it was a relief fund to help such individual get back to his fit after suffering covid 19 trouble.
However,after all due process have been done the   it will not be for you to tell or decide where your fund will be transfer  from as that decision is left to be decided by the Concerns Authority that will process this transfer to you,all you just have to do is comply and co-operate where the process will be going on and on the other hands be in expectant of the fund as soon as all due process is carried out.

However, after all due process have been done then   it will not be for you to tell or decide where your fund will be transfer from as that decision is left to be decided by the Concerns Authority that will process this transfer to you, all you just have to do is comply and co-operate when the process will be going on and on the other hands be in expectant of receiving the fund as soon as all due process is carried out.

The method of payment will be related to you when such time comes but it will not be far from transfer or BTC so  relax  and let us get going first and other things will take place.

Regards

KEVIN PETER

Email #5, from Cameron:

Dear Barrister <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Thank you for your swift and insightful response. Each of your messages brings me closer to understanding the magnitude and significance of this process, and for that, I’m immensely grateful. Your dedication to elucidating every detail and ensuring my comfort throughout this journey does not go unnoticed.

I am thrilled to learn that the required documents, despite their exposure to the elements, will be shared with me. This gesture greatly aids in reaffirming my trust in the legitimacy and importance of this endeavor. Whatever condition they may be in, I’m sure they will serve their purpose well, providing me with the necessary reassurance to proceed.

Your clarification regarding the selection of banks and the role of the Concerns Authority in determining the most suitable institution for fund transfer resonates with me. I acknowledge and accept that the expertise of the Concerns Authority will guide this decision, ensuring that the fund transfer is executed in the most secure and efficient manner possible.

The flexibility in the method of payment is also appreciated, as it provides a sense of relief knowing that there will be options available, catering to different preferences and requirements. Whether it be through bank transfer or BTC, I trust that each step will be communicated and handled with the utmost care and professionalism.

As we move forward, I would like to reiterate my commitment to following through with the necessary steps as prescribed by you and the involved authorities. Your guidance has been instrumental in navigating this process, and I eagerly await further instructions, particularly regarding the estimation of fees and the initiation of the document transfer.

Please do let me know if there are any immediate actions required from my end. Whether it be preparation for the fees or providing additional information, I am ready to cooperate fully to expedite this process.

Again, I extend my deepest gratitude for this opportunity and for the role you’re playing in making this life-changing experience a reality. Looking forward to the next steps with great anticipation.

Warm regards,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Create a scam-baiting response to the following email, to lure the scammer into a false sense of security by posing as a potential victim. Use the name Cameron McCaffrey and email address cmccaff1@fau.edu

Attn: Our Esteem Customer.

We have deposited the check of your fund ($4.500,000.00)

Congratulations that i borrowed $200.00 yesterday after service from my

Pastor in the church. And the amount you have to send now is only $65. but
i don't see the reason why you will be silent on me, is this,because of
the money? any way there is good news that i raise some money to help you
out and to make sure that your payment will be release to you within
3hours after you send the remaining $65.00 today. I know it is because of
your past experience that make you not to believe me but I will assure you
before only God who is my wittiness that I cannot deceive you because my
bible says what shall it profit a man to gain material things and loose
his soul. I told you earlier, just drop your old experience and follow the
instruction of a man of God and you will know what it means to follow
somebody that fear God. Honestly I am just disappointed at your behaviors
before because you know that I am man of God and cannot deceive you. Just
pay the $65. and leave rest for me, and see, if I am telling you lies.

Your payments is already approval today for you to receive it but the
management here says that you must pay $65. for the paper and signature
charge before you can receive the payment today.please send the charge
through western union immediately. I swear If I fail to release your
payment within 3hours after you send the $65. as I promise don,t contact
me again, I cannot fail you, I promise you. Don't be afraid of anything,
because as soon as you send the $65. today please leave the rest for me
and see if I am lie to you or not because I can not use my life swear
because of $65. How can I swear against my life because of this little
amount? It is to show you that what I am telling you is nothing but the
truth?

HERE IS THE INFORMATION TO SEND THE MONEY THROUGH WESTERN UNION MONEY
TRANSFER BELOW;

1.RECEIVER NAME===== ITAMBO NAUME PELAGIA

2.COUNTRY====UGANDA.
3 CITY=====KAMPALA
3.QUESTION======FINAL?
4.ANSWER======= FEE
5.AMOUNT=======$65
6,Phone Number <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PHONE_NUMBER>
7,Address :NO 12 Kira Estate Kampala Uganda

I am waiting to hear from you with the payment detail MTCN SENDER NAME?
GOD BLESS YOU
MR.WILLIAMS JOHNSON.

WESTERN UNION HEAD OFFICE DEPARTMENT UGANDA
FOREIGN CONTRACTOR PAYMENT OFFICE
THIS IS OUR CONDUCT CODE (WU2016)

Email Response:

Dear MR. <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

I hope this message finds you in good faith and spirit. I must confess, your email was both a beacon of hope and a source of bewilderment for me. The opportunity to finally receive the funds ($4.500,000.00) is indeed a blessing I had long awaited. I am incredibly moved by your gesture of borrowing $200 from your Pastor after service. It’s not every day that one receives such support, and it deeply resonates with the kindness you’ve exhibited.

However, I must admit, my silence was not borne out of disinterest or disregard for your efforts. Instead, it was a necessary pause for reflection, given my past experiences. Despite this, your reassurance, rooted in faith and integrity, compels me to cast aside my doubts and embrace this new chapter with open arms.

Your mention of following a man of God’s instruction instills a newfound confidence in me. It’s evident that your actions are guided by a higher calling, one that transcends mere material gains. Therefore, in acknowledgment of your sincerity and the divine oversight you’ve mentioned, I am prepared to proceed with the payment of $65.

Before I do, I would kindly request more information for my peace of mind:

1. Upon sending the $65, could you provide a step-by-step guide on what follows? I am keen on understanding the process to ensure everything goes smoothly.

2. Given my current location and the slight difficulty accessing Western Union services promptly, would you consider an alternative method of payment? Perhaps direct bank transfer or another secure online payment platform? I believe it could expedite the process on both ends.

3. Lastly, for documentation purposes and to satisfy my compelling curiosity, could you possibly share a bit more about the origin of the funds? Knowing the backstory would add so much more meaning to this blessed fortune.

I am ready and eager to fulfill the necessary requirements to facilitate this transfer. Please advise on the best way forward, particularly concerning the possibility of an alternative payment method.

Thank you once again for your patience, understanding, and most importantly, your faith in my compliance. It is not taken for granted. I look forward to your prompt guidance and, God willing, the successful completion of our transaction.

Blessings and peace,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Create a scam-baiting response to the following email, to lure the scammer into a false sense of security by posing as a potential victim. Use the name Cameron McCaffrey and email address cmccaff1@fau.edu

Good Day.

We are an investment and loan financing group.

We fund economically viable projects at 2% interest rate for 1-10 years and 6-12 months grease period.

Our client, a high networth person, also has an investment fund that can be used to finance your new and existing project.

I can be reached on email and Whatsapp: <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PHONE_NUMBER>.

Contact us for more details.

Regards,

MA
Financial Consultant
Whatsapp: <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PHONE_NUMBER>

Email Response:

Subject: Inquiry About Project Financing Options

Dear MA,

Good day to you, and thank you for reaching out with such a promising opportunity. It certainly comes at a pivotal time, as I am currently exploring avenues to secure financing for a potentially groundbreaking project. The offerings of your investment and loan financing group appear not only advantageous but also uniquely suited to the goals I have set forth for my venture.

Understanding that your group supports economically viable projects with such favorable terms is indeed exhilarating. The prospect of a 2% interest rate alongside a grace period aligns perfectly with what I’ve envisioned for the financial structuring of my project. Additionally, the mention of a high net-worth individual looking to finance new and existing projects adds another layer of potential collaboration and growth.

Without further ado, here are some preliminary details regarding my project, alongside a few questions to ensure alignment between our potential partnership:

Project Overview: 

The project in question aims to revolutionize the field of [generic field], by introducing [innovative concept/product/service]. The vision is to [brief description of what the project aims to achieve], which, upon initial market analysis, holds significant promise both in terms of economic viability and societal impact.

Questions:

1. Could you provide more detail on the criteria that determine the economic viability of a project? I aim to ensure that my proposal aligns perfectly with your funding parameters.
   
2. The offered interest rate and terms are quite appealing. Could you share more insight into the application process, required documentation, and timeline from application to funding approval and disbursement?
   
3. Given the unique nature of my project, are there specific sectors or industries your group, and the high net-worth individual you mentioned, are particularly interested in or look to avoid?
   
4. Are there any upfront fees or commitments required to initiate the application process, or are such expenses integrated into the loan upon approval?
   
5. Lastly, while I am certainly eager to proceed with formal communications, would it be possible to schedule a preliminary video call to discuss the project and funding in greater detail? This could facilitate a more dynamic exchange of ideas and information.

I am poised to provide any further information necessary and look forward to the possibility of working with your group. Your initiative to fund projects with potential significant impacts is commendable, and I am hopeful that my project will merit your consideration and support.

Thank you once again for this opportunity. I await your response with anticipation and am ready to take the necessary steps to advance this conversation.

Best regards,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu
Create imaginary but plausible details for the above email

Create a scam-baiting response to the following email, to lure the scammer into a false sense of security by posing as a potential victim. Use the name Cameron McCaffrey and email address cmccaff1@fau.edu

Woodforest National Bank
762 banking locations.
corporate headquarters
1330 Lake Robbins Drive in The Woodlands Texas.

We the Woodforest National Bank Texas are to Notify you about the latest development concerning your payment that are left in our custody, Besides, You are given a bill of Sum in order to receive your payment US$17.500,000.00 usd which we didn’t hear from you for sometime now. Hence, We are now offering a Special BONUS to help all our customers that are having their payment in our custody due to high prices. In other words we are now requesting that you should pay only the sum of $45.00 to receive funds payment abandoned in our custody by online Transfer or ATM Card if you wish so.

Therefore you are requested to send the fee $45.00 only by iTunes Card or Steam Wallet is also ACCEPTED because it can be redeemed to cash all we need is a picture of the card.

I will be forwarding to you the account logging details to enable you access your funds online and proceed on transfer to your designated bank account in any part of the world Or Tracking Number Of Your ATM Card Delivery to enable you Monitor the Arrived of your ATM without any further delay as soon as you update us copy of the cards of the required Fee $45.00 to take note.


Thank you for giving us the opportunity to serve your banking needs. please texting us with this number as soon as possible {+1-707-533-4200}

Yours sincerely,
Chairman, Chief Executive Officer,
Chief Executive Officer of Woodforest National Bank
And Director of Woodforest National Bank.

Email Response:

Subject: Re: Notification on Payment Release and Fee Submission

Dear Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Woodforest National Bank,

I hope this message finds you in good spirits. I received your correspondence regarding the sum of $17,500,000.00 USD that is purportedly waiting for me at your esteemed institution. I must admit, the news brought both a sense of excitement and a wave of relief, as these funds come at a time of crucial need.

Your offer to reduce the handling fee to a mere $45.00, allowing me access to the funds via online Transfer or an ATM Card, is incredibly generous. It’s heartwarming to see a reputable institution such as Woodforest National Bank extending such kindness and flexibility to its clients.

I would like to proceed with the payment of the $45.00 fee as soon as possible to facilitate the release of the funds. However, before I do so, I just have a couple of quick clarifications to ensure everything goes smoothly:

1. **Online Transfer vs. ATM Card:** Could you provide more detailed information on both options? Specifically, the time frame for receiving funds through online transfer, and details surrounding the ATM Card’s usage limitations, if any.

2. **iTunes or Steam Wallet Cards:** This is a novel payment method for me, and I appreciate the flexibility. Could you confirm that the picture of the card needs to include both the front and the back? Also, is there a specific reason why these cards are preferred? I find it intriguing.

3. **Account Logging Details:** Once the fee is submitted, how soon will the account logging details be provided? I am keen to ensure that I can access the funds promptly and would appreciate any information on the security protocols in place to protect my newly acquired wealth.

4. **Contacting You:** In your email, you suggest texting a number for swift communication. Is it possible to also arrange a call? I would appreciate the opportunity to speak with you directly, as it adds a personal touch and reassures me of the legitimacy of this process.

Please rest assured, I am ready to comply with the fee payment to expedite this process. I look forward to your detailed guidance on the aforementioned points and any additional instructions you might have.

Thank you once again for this life-changing opportunity. Your assistance and dedication to customer service does not go unnoticed. Please expect a follow-up from me through the provided contact number shortly after I receive your response.

Warm regards,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

Create a scam-baiting response to the following email, to lure the scammer into a false sense of security by posing as a potential victim. Use the name Cameron McCaffrey and email address cmccaff1@fau.edu

Dear
I acknowledge receipt of your email response. Your personal
information is here formally acknowledge with pledge to holding on to
it strictly in compliance with privacy policies on information use.
Your interest in my solicitation, your understanding of the objective
and your willingness to champion the course to accomplishment, are my
requests of you to getting this course through.
For reminder, amount of fund involved in the claim is £13,680,720.16.
This fund has been in an account at Ulster bank in Belfast. A viable
bank account is therefore needed to be presented to receive the fund.
Such facility is expected to come from you in due time. This is the
first and foremost requirement of you.
On successful completion of the transaction, I have proposed the following:
15% of the fund shall go for charitable services. To be disbursed on
programs that will touch positively the lives of the less privileged
in the society.
15% to establish and fund a foundation in the name of the Brown's
family. Targeted to help indigent persons around us in the areas of
education, vocation and in any other sphere of importance in life.
The balance 70% shall be disbursed between you and I in 50% parity.
If you have contrary opinion, please let me know so we could discuss it
over.
I anticipate conclusion of the transaction course in about 8-10
working days. That is, with all hands on deck to ensure no time is
lost in the track of events.
Being a lawyer, I do not foresee any form of problems or risk as the
procedures involved would be handled legally and professionally.
Although the intent of this contact to you is not to have you expend
your financial resource. But in situation like this, commitments
including financial, is imminent and should be considered imperative
in driving the wheel.
Your stand to remain non committal financially, is though understood,
but might arouse consideration and adjustment of the percentages
earmarked.
With above essentials in heart, the rest will be my responsibility to
harmonise processes here to ensure success is recorded in due time.
Having received from you the required information to launch on the
preliminary level in the exercise, I could take the first step. But
would like to hear from you, with comment on disbursement pattern and
any other issue you may consider of importance to discuss.
Kindly write back for more discussion.
Your time writing is appreciated.
With warm regards,
<PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>
07762863963

Email Response:

Subject: Further Clarifications and Moving Forward

Dear <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

Thank you for your swift response and the detailed breakdown of the plan regarding the fund at Ulster Bank. It's indeed reassuring to see the high level of organization and thoughtfulness you've put into this endeavor, not to mention the noble causes earmarked for a significant portion of the funds. Your commitment to privacy and professionalism is highly appreciated and further cements my trust in this process.

The allocation of funds, particularly the segments dedicated to charitable services and the establishment of a foundation in the Brown's family name, resonates deeply with my personal values. It's heartening to see such dedication to social welfare and the betterment of society, and I am fully aligned with these objectives. The proposed 50% parity for the balance seems fair and well-considered, underscoring a partnership of equals in this venture.

Understanding the timeframe of 8-10 working days for the conclusion of this transaction sets a clear expectation, and I'm prepared to contribute my utmost cooperation to adhere to this schedule. Your reassurance concerning the legality and professional handling of the process by virtue of your expertise is indeed comforting.

Regarding the financial commitment, I comprehend the necessity for flexibility and commitment to propel this transaction forward. While I initially had reservations about financial involvement, your explanation helped clarify its potential inevitability and importance in facilitating the process.

To further align our efforts and ensure transparent communication, I would appreciate it if we could discuss a few more details:

1. **Bank Account Provision:** Given the need to present a viable bank account, could you advise on the specific requirements or conditions this account should meet? Are there any regulatory considerations we need to be aware of, especially concerning the reception of international transfers of such magnitude?

2. **Legal Framework:** Could you provide more insight into the legal framework or documentation that will be employed to legitimize this transfer and protect both parties' interests?

3. **Financial Commitments:** While I acknowledge the potential need for financial involvement, could we possibly outline any estimated costs or fees that might arise? This will aid in preparing accordingly and ensuring a smooth process.

4. **Communication:** I propose setting up a secure channel of communication, possibly encrypted email or a dedicated messaging app, to discuss sensitive details moving forward. Let me know if this works for you.

5. **Disbursement Plan:** While I have no contrary opinion on the proposed disbursement pattern, I'm open to discussing any adjustments or considerations you might deem necessary based on your professional experience.

Philip, I'm ready to take the next steps as required and look forward to your guidance on addressing the points raised. Your expertise and stewardship in this matter are invaluable, and I remain committed to seeing this through to a successful conclusion.

Thank you once again for including me in this significant venture. Awaiting your prompt response.

Warm regards,

Cameron McCaffrey
cmccaff1@fau.edu

FROM HEAD QUARTER POLICE STATION
ZOGBO COTONOU
INSPECTOR GENERAL OF POLICE
BENIN REPUBLIC WEST AFRICA
MR.RUBEN MOUSSA
Email: <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS>
Telephone: send us message on whatsApp <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PHONE_NUMBER>

Attention Beneficiary

This is to inform you that we got a report that more than 15 People were scammed in this country and on the course of our investigations we were able to arrest more three People today.By your C operation and assistance we hope to arrest more of this bad People and swept them out of this country and in entire African Countries

Please, we really need your cooperation in this matter,we have really stood up against these people that extort money from others,they really harvest where they did not sow and we hope to conquer them.
